decision.archive_summary: Minor-GC regression work for this repo was completed. Durable outcomes to retain as compact pins: packaged guard was tightened to avoid overriding shadow-guard vetoes rather than using a whitelist-style fix; harder natural-Chinese multi-turn detour/return coverage was added to fixed live evals; the runnable live eval command was executed and reported passing after the fixes.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest request was to rerun an automatable test, and the assistant reported it had been run. The earlier implementation/debugging thread appears resolved rather than still active. For the next turn, raw prompt weight can be reduced aggressively: keep only the latest user turn by runtime policy, evict the earlier solved build/debug exchanges, and preserve the durable technical outcomes as compact pins so related follow-up work can resume without carrying the full transcript.
